mapper.select: SELECT rp.id, rp.user_id AS userId, ui.username, ui.nickname, rp.permission, rp.created_at AS createdAt FROM resource_permission rp LEFT JOIN user_info ui ON rp.user_id = ui.id AND ui.is_del = 0 WHERE rp.resource_type = #{resourceType} AND rp.resource_id = #{resourceId} AND rp.is_del = 0 ORDER BY rp.created_at ASC

SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM class_contest_rel ccr INNER JOIN class_student_rel csr ON ccr.class_id = csr.class_id WHERE ccr.contest_id = #{contestId} AND csr.user_id = #{userId} AND ccr.is_del = 0 AND csr.is_del = 0
